mapper.select: SELECT phone FROM biz_wx_user WHERE phone IS NOT NULL
SELECT * FROM app_up_merchants WHERE huanxin_username is NULL
SELECT COUNT(1) brandId,COALESCE(SUM(fixloss),0) balance FROM app_indent WHERE up_id = #{id}
SELECT city_name FROM app_city WHERE adcode = (SELECT citycode FROM app_city WHERE adcode = #{adcode})
SELECT citycode FROM app_city WHERE city_name like "%"#{selectAdcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}"%" LIMIT 0 ,1
SELECT id FROM app_car_brand WHERE `name` LIKE "%"#{selectBrand,jdbcType=VARCHAR}"%" LIMIT 0 ,1
